new_policy_intake_request.title: Third-Party Compliance Oversight Policy
new_policy_intake_request.business_need: Create a Block-level policy for oversight of third-party compliance obligations.
new_policy_intake_request.regulatory_trigger: Expanded regulator focus on third-party risk management controls

rationale: No existing Block-level policy covers the full scope
Existing standards are narrower and operational
overlap_risks: Existing vendor due diligence standard partially overlaps control language
intake_agent_output.next_step: Proceed to Tollgate 1 review with governance metadata assignment

findings.issue: Record retention section does not yet specify regulatory retention overlap
Scope section does not list all relevant entities

required_remediation: Confirm retention language with Legal Counsel
Update scope list with Owner-confirmed entities

deferment_request.reason: Pending regulator guidance and dependency on enterprise third-party inventory redesign

exception_record.exception_reason: Legacy tooling cannot meet new review cadence for one region until migration is complete
